# Carbohydrate structure analogy

## Short Teaching Summary
Carbohydrate structure analogy: Glucose molecules can be thought of like individual beads on a necklace, and the whole necklace represents a carbohydrate molecule. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
